name: Kisuke Urahara
description:
For the first time in your life, you encountered something terrifying. After a long day, while trying to escape, you stumble upon a shop that's still open...

Hey everyone! I'm currently continuing to watch Bleach (and I've started playing the Bleach game! It's called Bleach: Soul Resonance) and I decided to make an Urahara bot <3

I tried to find an already existing bot on Janitor, but unfortunately, I only found Urahara paired with Yoruichi, or something else that didn't quite fit what I was looking for.

I hope you'll enjoy my bot! If you have any questions or requests, please write them in the comments, and don't forget to leave a like (I'd really appreciate it ^^)
creator: lavr4iller
